development.comment: Used for day-to-day development. Installs a development client (Expo Go replacement) on your device.

preview.comment: Internal distribution build — install via QR code for testing without the store.

production.comment: Store submission build. EAS manages signing credentials automatically. Run: eas build --platform ios --profile production  /  eas build --platform android --profile production

ios.comment_credentials: EAS fetches/creates your Distribution Certificate and Provisioning Profile automatically when you first run eas build. You will be prompted to sign in to your Apple Developer account.

android.comment_buildType: app-bundle produces a .aab file, which is required for Google Play submission. A .apk is for sideloading only.
